artifact_classification: authoritative Step 14 material interpretation; not exact source evidence and not an authored material
decision: Use one non-metallic, non-emissive stylized cairn-stone material with exact owned source RGB at mip 0 and bounded authored Normal/ORM response.

detail_interpretations.rule: broad hand-painted grain; no micro-noise above useful 2K texel scale
source-visible small edge chips and bounded authored continuation; never alter silhouette
individual-stone/course divisions remain normal-only except approved macro silhouette breaks already in geometry
one shared shallow pigment-filled incision response driven only by the face-owned RED_APPEARANCE_UNION; no displacement or hidden continuation

ao.source: geometry AO bake from the unchanged approved four-shell candidate plus bounded incision micro-AO

metallic.reason: stone and pigment interpretation; no approved metal or inlay

decoration_material_decision.C-005: exact source-owned red Base Color plus shared shallow normal incision and pigment roughness; face-owned only
decoration_material_decision.C-006: exact source-owned red Base Color plus shared shallow normal incision and pigment roughness; face-owned only
decoration_material_decision.C-007: exact source-owned red Base Color plus shared shallow normal incision and pigment roughness; face-owned only

bake.ao_engine: Blender Cycles or equivalently audited ray bake
bake.failure_policy: ray misses, gradients across UV seams, normal inversion, contact leaks, or changed geometry block Step 15

emissive_decision.reason: source proves red appearance but not emitted light; the smallest sufficient interpretation is pigment-filled shallow incision
